channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: An AI-powered hotel is coming to Las Vegas
item.description: Artificial intelligence was everywhere at CES in 2025, but in the coming months, it’s going to be a more permanent part of the Las Vegas landscape. This March will see the soft opening of the Otonomus Hotel, which strives to be different than your typical Vegas hotel room or suite.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Shape-shifting AI Transformer homes will leave you wanting one
item.description: AC Future and Pininfarina unveil AI Transformer homes, merging sustainability and innovation. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this could change the way we think about home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The journey towards a knowledge graph for generative AI
item.description: How does the journey to a knowledge graph start with unstructured data—such as text, images, and other media? The evolution of web search engines offers an instructive example, showing how knowledge can be extracted from unstructured sources and refined over time into a structured, interconnected gr
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Joe Biden’s new chip export rules strangle competition to ensure U.S. AI supremacy
item.description: America, a country built on the principle of free markets, has decided to shut off around 120 countries from accessing the most valuable element that is powering the free market at present.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Akeneo aims to transform the retail playbook with AI and data consistency
item.description: Australian retailers have spent much of the last few years buffeted by economic challenges. In 2024, squeezed by the rising cost of living, inflationary impact, and interest rates, they are now grappling with declining consumer spending and confidence.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New Brazil law restricts use of smartphones in elementary and high schools
item.description: Brazil’s President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva has signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations.
item.dc:creator: Mauricio Savarese And Diarlei Rodrigues, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: ClickUp CEO Zeb Evans on why workplaces will be using fewer platforms in the future
item.description: If your team subscribes to 10 different software tools, you’re not alone in wrestling with the overwhelming sprawl of productivity apps. Entrepreneurs have taken notice.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: CISA publishes security goals for software development process, product design
item.description: The US Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has published IT sector-specific goals (IT SSGs) to protect against cyber threats, including 11 software development process goals and seven product design goals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to stop doomscrolling and get your motivation back
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Delia Cai, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy online from anywhere – stream Sean Combs documentary
item.description: The downfall of a big star, as told by those close to him – here's how to watch Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy online no matter where in the world you are.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: There's one handheld gaming PC that went under the radar at CES 2025 - and it's got a secret weapon to beat the competition
item.description: The handheld gaming PC race continues, as Tencent had its 3D handheld gaming PC showcased at CES 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple execs head to London to fight for the App Store
item.description: On the day the UK government confirms an AI future for the country (we’ll see how that goes), Apple’s App Store pricing model has gone on trial in London.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to use the new Lock object in C# 13
item.description: The C# programming language has provided support for thread synchronization using the lock keyword since its earliest versions. By using a lock statement, you ensure that only one thread can execute the body of the statement at a time. Any other thread is blocked until the lock is released.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta rolls back hate speech rules as Zuckerberg cites 'recent elections' as a catalyst
item.description: It wasn't just fact-checking that Meta scrapped from its platforms as it prepares for the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cisco in 2025: Lots of hard work ahead
item.description: For a company of its size, Cisco executed a fairly short list of technology rollouts in 2024 and made a surprising lack of major updates to its core networking portfolio, which might have contributed to the 23% decline in networking revenue Cisco reported in its latest quarterly financials.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia launches blueprints to help jump start AI projects
item.description: Give Nvidia credit, it’s not just talking up big ideas, it’s helping its customers achieve them. The vendor recently issued designs for AI factories after hyping up the idea for several months.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Preventing this insidious email forwarding scam that will drain your bank account
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says business email compromise scams are a serious threat, as shown by Teresa W.'s near loss of thousands of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Japan links Chinese hacker MirrorFace to dozens of cyberattacks targeting security and tech data
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive meas
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Why the C programming language still rules
item.description: The C programming language has been alive and kicking since 1972, and it still reigns as one of the essential building blocks of our software-studded world.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Intro to Ktor: The HTTP server for Kotlin
item.description: Kotlin is a modern general-purpose language that brings together object-oriented and functional programming power in a sleek syntax. Ktor is the official HTTP server for Kotlin, leveraging Kotlin’s expressiveness for building endpoints and other server-side necessities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta eliminates fact-checking in latest bow to Trump
item.description: Meta chief executive officer Mark Zuckerberg on Tuesday announced changes to content moderation on Facebook and Instagram long sought by conservatives. Incoming President Donald Trump said the new approach was “probably” due to threats he made against the technology mogul.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, BARBARA ORTUTAY and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal IT skills shortage: How AI can help relieve the gap and improve security
item.description: The global IT skills shortage is predicted to impact 90% of organizations by 2026, according to IDC. The post Federal IT skills shortage: How AI can help relieve the gap and improve security first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
